productDisplayName: Miki Pearl Women Ivory Jewellery Set
description: Style Note From the depths of the ocean, Gitanjali Lifestyle presents miki pearl &ndash a stunning new collection of fresh water pearl jewellery. The combined effect of pearls with stones on this classic necklace and earring set gives you a look that is radiant and priceless. Product Details earrings and necklace set, pearl necklace, pearl and stone encrusted silver coloured pendant, pearl and stone encrusted silver coloured earrings Materials and Care Freshwater pearls Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust
